spec.name: SEQERALABS_NF_AGGREGATE:NF_AGGREGATE:SEQERA_RUNS_DUMP (ULVYH4G9KM9sP)
spec.script:
tw \
         \
         \
         \
        --url=https://api.cloud.seqera.io \
        --access-token=eyJ0aWQiOiAxNDA5Mn0uMWMzZTUyOWQ3MDMxZGE3NTJlNDU1ODVjMDRkNGUyZTliY2UzNjVmMg== \
        runs \
        dump \
        -id=ULVYH4G9KM9sP \
        --workspace=seqeralabs/showcase \
        --output="ULVYH4G9KM9sP.tar.gz" \
        --add-fusion-logs \
        --add-task-logs 2>&1 || if [ ! -f "ULVYH4G9KM9sP.tar.gz" ]; then exit 1; fi

    mkdir -p ULVYH4G9KM9sP
    tar \
        -xvf \
        ULVYH4G9KM9sP.tar.gz \
        -C ULVYH4G9KM9sP

    cat <<-END_VERSIONS > versions.yml
    "SEQERALABS_NF_AGGREGATE:NF_AGGREGATE:SEQERA_RUNS_DUMP":
        seqera-cli: $(echo $(NO_COLOR=true tw --version 2>&1) | sed 's/^.*Tower CLI version //; s/ *$//')
    END_VERSIONS
